name: Macadamia Nut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and salt together, then sift again.
2. In a large bowl, cream butter until smooth.
3. Gradually add granulated sugar and continue to cream until well blended.
4. Add vanilla and mix in thoroughly.
5. Gradually beat in the sifted flour mixture until smooth.
6. Mix in coconut and chopped macadamia nuts.
7. Shape dough into a roll about 1.5 inches in diameter and wrap in clear plastic wrap.
8. Refrigerate for at least 6 hours or overnight.
9. Preheat oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
10. Slice the chilled dough into rounds, each about 0.25 inch thick.
11. Place slices on a greased baking sheet.
12. Bake for 20 minutes.
13. Remove from oven and sift confectioners' sugar over cooled cookies.
14. Reserve about one-third of the sugar to dust the tops lightly before cooling completely.
15. Store in cookie tins once cool. Makes approximately 3 1/2 dozen cookies.
